title: Junior Business Development Manager at MagicBricks

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at MagicBricks
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? MagicBricks in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MagicBricks:
MagicBricks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MagicBricks!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
